plan_metadata.name: Feature Del Resource Group And Reprovision For Bot

steps.description: Click the "Teams Agents and Apps" option in the "New Project" dropdown menu to select the template for creating chat bots, web pages, or other apps in Microsoft Teams, within the Visual Studio Code Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension.

Click the "Other Teams Capabilities" item in the dropdown menu within the "Teams Agent or App Using Microsoft Teams SDK" selection dialog in Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit, as indicated by the red crosshair at (311, 223).
Click the "Simple Bot" option in the "Teams Capability" dropdown menu within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "TypeScript" option in the "Programming Language" selection dropdown within Visual Studio Code while using the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension.
Click the "Default folder: /home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects" option in the Workspace Folder selection dialog in Visual Studio Code to set the project root folder.
Press the F1 key in Visual Studio Code to open the Command Palette, while viewing the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit sidebar and the OUTPUT panel showing provision lifecycle messages.
Type the text "provision" into the Visual Studio Code command palette (top-center input box), within the Microsoft 365 Agents extension workspace.
Click on the "Microsoft 365 Agent: Provision" command in the Visual Studio Code command palette.
Click the "Provision" button in the confirmation dialog for provisioning resources in the dev environment within Visual Studio Code.
Press the F1 key to open the command palette in Visual Studio Code, within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension interface on the "Provision" stage.
Type text 'notifications: show notifications' into the VS Code command palette input field at the top center of the interface.
Click the "Notifications: Show Notifications" command in the Visual Studio Code command palette, located below the search input field.
@assertion  there is an error message visible in the screenshot.
